scenes.narration: Here's a quick tour of showtell — every scene kind, rendered from this real repository.
The local advantage: code scenes reference the repo, and the renderer reads the live bytes, so the code on screen is always ground truth.
Diff scenes come straight from git. Here the CLI grew its render and capture dependencies.
Built-in visuals, screen capture, and bundle hyperframes cover the video formats we need.
Screencap scenes composite a real screen recording into the timeline.

content.heading: What makes it different
points: Local and repo-aware: it reads the real diff and files.
The agent authors only a spec; the renderer owns every pixel.
Deterministic, cached, and watermarked — desktop and mobile.

scenes.narration: It's local, the agent only writes a spec, and every render is deterministic and cached.
